effect-smol.purpose: Read-only Effect v4 source pinned to the tag matching the effect catalog — the authority on what v4 actually exports, plus the v3→v4 migration notes and the @effect/vitest reference implementation.

orientation.layout: Sparse checkout: packages/effect (core source + package.json exports map), packages/vitest (@effect/vitest reference implementation), migration/ (per-domain v3→v4 notes), ai-docs/, LLMS.md, MIGRATION.md.
orientation.startHere: packages/effect/src settles what v4 actually exports (evidence-ladder rung 2); migration/*.md settles v3→v4 renames (rung 1). Before trusting an answer, check the pin matches the installed effect version — node_modules wins on disagreement.

commonmark-js.purpose: Port base for @effected/markdown: the CommonMark reference parser (two-phase blocks/inlines algorithm, BSD-2) pinned at spec 0.31.2

commonmark-spec.purpose: CommonMark 0.31.2 spec text and conformance tooling (spec.txt, spec_tests.py, normalize.py) — source of the 652-example corpus for @effected/markdown

cmark-gfm.purpose: GFM spec text and corpora (test/spec.txt extension sections, extensions.txt incl. footnotes, pathological tests) plus C reference implementations of the GFM constructs

mdast.purpose: The mdast spec prose (readme.md IS the spec) — the node-type contract @effected/markdown's Schema classes mirror, incl. the GFM extension node set

mdast-util-from-markdown.purpose: Reference for event-to-mdast tree assembly and the 27 position-complete .md/.json AST fixtures used as @effected/markdown's interop corpus
